methodsAttempted.query: site:unimore.it intelligenza artificiale generativa studenti esami Universita Modena Reggio Emilia
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl was not available in this worker environment, so official-domain public web search was used. Results included stale SIA pages, an official UnimoreInforma ChatGPT license communication, course pages, events, and research/project pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:unimore.it ChatGPT Unimore supporto.ai@unimore.it linee guida AI Ateneo
methodsAttempted.notes: Search found the live UnimoreInforma communication at in.unimore.it/uinfo/vediuinfo.html?c=5070 and stale SIA software pages now redirecting to DIAQ 404 pages.
robots.txt returned 404, and the fetched page declares ROBOTS ALL in page metadata; the crawl used one public official communication page only.
The indexed SIA ChatGPT and AI tools pages redirected to www.diaq.unimore.it paths returning 404, so they were recorded as stale rejected candidates.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one live official UnimoreInforma communication with substantive AI-use recommendations and ChatGPT Edu licensing details. Stale SIA software pages now return 404 after redirect, and event/course/research pages were not used for claims because they do not provide university-wide AI policy or operational guidance.

artifacts.queryUsed: site:unimore.it ChatGPT Unimore supporto.ai@unimore.it linee guida AI Ateneo
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UnimoreInforma communication addressed to teaching and research staff, published 12 November 2025, with ChatGPT Edu license details and interim responsible AI-use recommendations while university AI guidelines are being defined.
Search index snippet was relevant, but direct HTTP fetch redirected to DIAQ and returned a 404 page, so this URL was not used as claim evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: La giornata si aprira con i saluti istituzionali per proseguire con un programma ricco di interventi specialistici e momenti di confronto.
artifacts.notes: The page is official and relevant background, but it describes an event and national guideline presentations rather than Unimore policy or operational AI-use rules.

expectedThemes: source verification and sensitive data handling

stopConditions: Stop after official sources support narrow claim candidates.
Do not infer binding university-wide policy from stale SIA pages, event pages, research projects, course pages, or external vendor privacy pages.
Preserve Italian snippets as canonical evidence and use English only as helper display text.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or browser profiles.

artifacts.claimText: Unimore stated that it had purchased ChatGPT Edu licenses under the CRUI-OpenAI agreement and that requested licenses would provide access to the 'Modena e Reggio Emilia EDU' workspace through institutional email.

citation.publisher: Universita degli studi di Modena e Reggio Emilia

artifacts.claimText: For ChatGPT Edu licenses, Unimore stated that inserted data would not be used to train models and that users remain owners of inputs and outputs.
artifacts.normalizedValue: ChatGPT Edu data not used for model training; input and output ownership retained

artifacts.claimText: Pending university AI-use guidelines, Unimore recommended verifying sources, keeping human control by using AI only as assistance, requesting source citations in prompts, protecting sensitive data, and documenting AI use in proceedings.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: A breve verranno assegnate le licenze di ChatGPT Edu che l'Ateneo ha acquistato nell'ambito della convenzione CRUI-OpenAI per il primo lotto di Ottobre. Chi ha richiesto la licenza ricevera una email con un link per accettare la licenza ed entrare con l'indirizzo istituzionale nella forma nome.cognome@unimore.it nel Workspace "Modena e Reggio Emilia EDU" attivato per l'Ateneo su chatgpt.com
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unimore said it had purchased ChatGPT Edu licenses under the CRUI-OpenAI agreement and that requesters would access the 'Modena e Reggio Emilia EDU' workspace through an institutional email address.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Nel frattempo, per un utilizzo responsabile ed efficace dei sistemi di AI, si raccomanda di - verificare sempre le fonti - mantenere il controllo umano usando l'AI solo come strumento di assistenza - strutturare correttamente le richieste chiedendo al sistema di AI la citazione delle fonti - proteggere i dati sensibili - documentare sempre l'utilizzo del sistemi di AI nei vari procedimenti

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow candidate because the official UnimoreInforma communication directly states the ChatGPT Edu license purchase and workspace access details.
Approved as a narrow candidate because the official source directly states the data-training and input/output ownership language for ChatGPT Edu licenses.
Approved as source-status only; the source says guidelines are being defined, so no binding university-wide AI policy claim is asserted.
Approved as recommendations, not mandatory rules; the Italian source uses 'si raccomanda' and the claim avoids binding language.

artifacts.title: University of Modena and Reggio Emilia AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: The staged run found one live official UnimoreInforma communication with ChatGPT Edu licensing details, a statement that AI-use guidelines are being defined, and interim responsible AI-use recommendations. Stale SIA pages and an event article were rejected as claim sources.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged report is not a production release and does not publish canonical claims.
The live source says AI-use guidelines are still being defined; interim recommendations should not be read as final binding policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
